title: High Growth Asian Companies With Strong Insider Ownership In May 2026
content:
Amidst the backdrop of geopolitical developments and shifting economic dynamics, Asian markets have been navigating a complex landscape, with investor sentiment buoyed by global negotiations and regional industrial growth. As we explore high-growth companies in Asia with strong insider ownership, it's crucial to consider how these factors can influence stock performance; particularly in environments where internal stakeholder confidence aligns with broader market optimism.

Top 10 Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership In Asia

Name Insider Ownership Earnings Growth Zhejiang Taotao Vehicles (SZSE:301345) 27.5% 31.5% Shanghai Biren Technology (SEHK:6082) 11% 120.7% SEERS (KOSDAQ:A458870) 33.2% 41.5% Meitu (SEHK:1357) 22.7% 31.5% Meiko Electronics (TSE:6787) 19.2% 27.6% L&C BIOLTD (KOSDAQ:A290650) 26% 175.4% HUMAN MADE (TSE:456A) 23.9% 22.6% Guangzhou Tinci Materials Technology (SZSE:002709) 38.4% 32.5% Gold Circuit Electronics (TWSE:2368) 30.2% 38.2% Fulin Precision (SZSE:300432) 10.4% 61.6%

We'll examine a selection from our screener results.

Akeso

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★★

Overview: Akeso, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the research, development, manufacture, and commercialization of antibody drugs globally, with a market cap of HK$108.79 billion.

Operations: The company generates revenue of CN¥3.06 billion from its activities in the research, development, production, and sale of biopharmaceutical products.

Insider Ownership: 18.1%

Earnings Growth Forecast: 60.6% p.a.

Akeso demonstrates strong growth potential with high insider ownership, driven by its innovative pipeline of bispecific and trispecific antibodies. Recent presentations at major oncology conferences highlight Akeso's promising clinical advancements, including ligufalimab for AML and ivonescimab for NSCLC. The company forecasts a revenue growth rate of 27.1% per year, outpacing the Hong Kong market average. Despite current net losses, Akeso is expected to achieve profitability within three years, reflecting robust future prospects in oncology therapeutics.

Get an in-depth perspective on Akeso's performance by reading our analyst estimates report here. Insights from our recent valuation report point to the potential overvaluation of Akeso shares in the market.SEHK:9926 Ownership Breakdown as at May 2026

Addvalue Technologies

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★★

Overview: Addvalue Technologies Ltd is an investment holding company that offers satellite-based communication and digital broadband products and solutions across Europe, the Middle East, Africa, North America, and the Asia Pacific with a market cap of SGD736.68 million.

Story Continues

Operations: The company generates revenue from bespoke telecommunication equipment and related products and components, amounting to $24.83 million.

Insider Ownership: 23%

Earnings Growth Forecast: 40.4% p.a.

Addvalue Technologies is experiencing robust growth, with earnings rising to US$4.83 million from US$1.95 million year-over-year and revenue expected to grow significantly faster than the market average at 28.3% annually. The company's strategic focus on its Space Connectivity business, particularly IDRS terminals, has resulted in substantial new orders totaling US$13.6 million, enhancing its order book to US$24.9 million and positioning it for further expansion in the LEO satellite sector despite recent share price volatility.

Our comprehensive valuation report raises the possibility that Addvalue Technologies is priced higher than what may be justified by its financials.SGX:A31 Earnings and Revenue Growth as at May 2026

Hunan Meihu Intelligent Manufacturing

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: Hunan Meihu Intelligent Manufacturing Co., Ltd. operates in the intelligent manufacturing sector and has a market cap of CN¥12.28 billion.

Operations: Unfortunately, the revenue segment data for Hunan Meihu Intelligent Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is not provided in the text.

Earnings Growth Forecast: 60.8% p.a.

Hunan Meihu Intelligent Manufacturing is poised for growth with its revenue projected to increase by 19.8% annually, outpacing the broader Chinese market's 16.3%. Despite a recent dip in profit margins from 8.4% to 3.2%, earnings are expected to grow significantly at over 60% per year, surpassing the market average of 27%. The company plans a private placement worth up to CNY980 million, indicating strong institutional interest and potential capital infusion for expansion initiatives.
